revision.comment: initial text of rough draft template -- 1st steps in a constructive direction
moving under construction template to bottom of page?
removing under construction template
removing extra line?
Removed "t" from "Ietshigi"
Iesada was the forth son of Ieyoshi, according to jp and zh wikipedia
[[WP:BOT|Bot]]: [[WP:R#Bypass_redirects_in_navigational_templates|Bypassing redirects in navboxes]], in order to improve article navigability;[[User:DASHBot/d|details/shutoff]]
title = Tokugawa shogunate family tree
[[ar:قالب:شجرة عائلة توكوغاوا]]
added some style
adding {{collapsible option}} and/or {{{state}}}
777sms moved page [[Template:Tokugawa dynasty (Japan)]] to [[Template:Tokugawa dynasty family tree]]
state handling, replaced HTML, below formatting, category
Added {{navbox}} unreferenced and a notes section if needed using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]
Migrating deprecated family tree template to chart template. Please help, see [[Template:Chart#Migration_from_familytree]]
George6VI moved page [[Template:Tokugawa dynasty family tree]] to [[Template:Tokugawa family tree]]
fix v-t-e links
I'm killing the reference here because it shows up randomly on the bottom of articles where this is used, without any obvious way to find it.
categorization (see also [[WP:CAT#]]) (via [[WP:JWB]])
41 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Tokugawa_family_tree]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
